title: Direct Preference Optimization for Vision-Language Models
summary: We adapt DPO preference optimization to multimodal LLMs and study preference data quality ablations.

title: RLHF Survey for Large Language Models
summary: A survey of RLHF and preference learning for text-only LLMs.

summary: We train an OCR model for historical handwriting recognition.

summary: Empirical study of preference data quality and reward hacking in multimodal alignment.

summary: Message passing networks for chemistry benchmarks.

title: Multimodal Instruction Tuning without Preference Labels
summary: Instruction tuning for VLMs using captions only, no human preference data.
